name: ghost-connector
description: Connect Claude to your Ghost blog — write, publish, and manage posts, pages, tags, members, tiers, newsletters, themes, and site settings through conversation.
long_description:
**Connect Claude to your Ghost blog.**

Write and publish posts and pages from natural language. Manage tags, authors, members, tiers, newsletters, themes, and site settings — all through conversation. No admin-panel clicking, no copy-paste.

## What you can do
- **Write posts** — describe what you want; Claude drafts and saves to Ghost.
- **Manage members** — add, update, label, and subscribe newsletter members.
- **Edit tags & authors** — organize your content taxonomy.
- **Configure tiers & newsletters** — manage paid memberships.
- **Activate themes** — switch your site's appearance.
- **Upload media** — add images from your machine to Ghost's library.
- **Register webhooks** — wire Ghost events to other services.

## Setup (two fields)

- **Blog URL** — the base URL of your Ghost site (e.g. `https://myblog.ghost.io` or `https://blog.example.com`). Change anytime from Claude Desktop's connector settings.
- **Admin API Key** — from Ghost Admin → Integrations → Add custom integration → Staff Admin API key (format `<id>:<secret>`).

All requests authenticate with short-lived (5-minute) signed JWTs derived from your key. The key itself is stored encrypted in your OS keychain.
